name: Joni Mitchell
abstract: Roberta Joan "Joni" Mitchell (née Anderson; born 7 November 1943) is a Canadian singer-songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, and painter. As one of the most influential singer-songwriters to emerge from the 1960s folk music circuit, Mitchell became known for her personal lyrics and unconventional compositions, which grew to incorporate elem…

about_quotes.speaker: Roger Kellaway
about_quotes.evidence: I became part of the L.A. Express... out of 55 concerts, we recorded 9 times, and there wasn't a single time that Joni liked it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Roger Kellaway interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 14, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Peter Erskine
about_quotes.evidence: Peter Erskine has performed and recorded with a lengthy list of ensembles and solo artists including ... Joni Mitchell.
about_quotes.doc_title: Peter Erskine interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Orleans, Louisiana, January 9, 2020

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Scott
about_quotes.evidence: in the case of Joni Mitchell she was a painter you know, and still is a painter. So she would say I don’t know I want it more green over here. Now what the hell does that mean? Well it’s my job to translate into music.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Scott interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 1, 2022 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Don Alias
about_quotes.evidence: I think “Bitches Brew” is but a platinum record, I got a platinum record for that one called “Innocent Age.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Don Alias interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 6, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Alicia Olatuja
about_quotes.evidence: I’m influenced by a lot of different musicians and artists... from Joni Mitchell to Imogen Heap... I actually do an encore... in another configuration program called Songs of Freedom, which celebrates songs of Nina Simone, Abbey Lincoln and Joni Mitchell.
about_quotes.doc_title: Alicia Olatuja interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, February 9, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Shaffer
about_quotes.evidence: Yes, thank you, certainly Joni Mitchell, yes. But she had her impact after she moved to Los Angeles and that, you know, I would never have done it on my own, come to the U.S.
about_quotes.doc_title: Paul Shaffer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 24, 2023
